_doc: Feature-readiness + build-state ledger. Drives the build-when-ready loop (scripts/next_buildable.py) and tracks the recovery->build backlog. readiness: 'ready' (server-side content, has name+taunts+biome, buildable on a proven pipeline) | 'partial' (needs more recovery) | 'needs_live_client' (UI/stat system, can't auto-validate without a client). built: true once shipped + boot-validated.
_readiness_gate: A feature is auto-buildable when type in [boss,dungeon] AND readiness=='ready' AND built==false. Systems marked needs_live_client are NEVER auto-built (require a human client test).

built.name: Gate to the Underworld (Ra/Sia/Hu + Pillars-style Staves)
Tomb of Decaying Death (Tombstone Carrier + roster)
Nyx of Fire (world boss, evil-player phase)

backlog.name: RENAME Death King -> Dwarf King
backlog.info: DONE 2026-06-03: renamed id 0x8fd3 'Death King'->'Dwarf King' across OrdinaryClient_Bosses.xml + BehaviorDb.OCBosses.cs + Oryx.cs RegionMobs + client embed. Server 0 errors, client SWF rebuilt (boot re-confirm sandbox-blocked; pure rename, 0 stray refs).

THE PERFECTION OF DIAGON!'), Riverborn ('Let's see how well you play...'), Firebreather ('Your courage softens me...'). Cracked Core glitch lines already present. Server 0 errors + client SWF rebuilt.

backlog.name: Anubi's Lair (Anubis + Pillars)
backlog.info: BUILT 2026-06-03: Anubis 0x8f00 (140k HP, gold sandstone temple) INVULNERABLE behind 4 destructible Pillars 0x8f01 ('Pillars... please help me!'); kill pillars -> 'I am losing strength... I am slowly dying...' weakened/vulnerable phase. Ra-and-Staves pattern. Portal 0x8213 -> AnubisLair.jm/.jw, wired into Nexus rotfPortals + client embed (OC_AnubisLairCXML). Taunts verbatim; attack geometry reconstructed. Server 0 errors, client SWF rebuilt. Live port-bind boot NOT confirmable (sandbox kills detached wServer) but collision-checked: no base 'Anubis' obj, XML globbed (*xml recursive) -> ids resolve 0x8f00/0x8f01.

backlog.name: FIX: Dwarf King duplicate-key boot crash
backlog.info: DONE 2026-06-03: prev session's 'Death King'->'Dwarf King' rename collided with the BASE-game 'Dwarf King' (MidCXML 0x61f + Midland.cs behavior) -> two .Init("Dwarf King") both resolved to type 1567 -> ArgumentException duplicate-key crash at boot (this was the latent crash the earlier sandbox-block hid). FIX: ROTF Dwarf King IS the base mini-boss (taunt 'You'll taste my axe!' matches verbatim) -> folded recovered taunts ('Tasted? Again!','Anyone! Anyone!!') into Midland.cs, deleted the dead duplicate (OCBosses Init + 0x8fd3 obj, shadowed/unreachable), removed its stray Mountains spawn. Now exactly one .Init("Dwarf King"). Server 0 errors.

backlog.name: Hela's Power staff (recovery -> Hela loot)
backlog.info: DONE 2026-06-03: fleshed out existing stub item 0x8026 from fresh frame recovery (disc_WrAfGGUcuhA verbatim tooltip): MaxDamage 325->360, Wisdom +4->+12, added Hexed-on-hit (2.2s) curse proc, capitalized id 'Hela's Power', full desc. Wired new ItemLoot('Hela's Power',0.05) into Asgard Hela's drop table. Server 0 errors, items .dat re-synced to client.

backlog.name: Tomb of the Ancients (Egyptian gods)
backlog.info: ALREADY IN BASE GAME (verified 2026-06-03) — NO build needed (would have been a dup-key crash). The base Tomb of the Ancients (portal 0x072c, key 0x710, BehaviorDb.Tomb.cs) IS the Egyptian-god dungeon: bosses Tomb Defender / Tomb Support / Tomb Attacker = Bes / Nut / Geb (they cross-reference by god name in existing taunts: 'Nut, disable our foes!', 'Geb, eradicate these cretins!', 'Bes, protect me at once!'). The recovery just rediscovered the base dungeon. TODO (optional): confirm it's reachable in-realm (key drop / Grand Sphinx event). NOTE: base Tomb Defender taunt 'Impudence! I am an Immortal...' may be the source of the ledger's 'White Dragon Lord' partial — verify before building that one.

backlog.name: /30 event-counter + global announcer
backlog.info: BUILT 2026-06-04: the /N defeat-counter + random-PERSONA global announcer was already implemented (Oryx.cs _galacticKills + BroadcastPersona 'The <Boss> has been defeated! (N/25)'; Personas[] already includes the recovered narrators Chimera/Reaper/Goblin/Spider/Bat/Dragon/Sprite/Medusa/Starforce/Djinn). COMPLETED the SPAWN side: SpawnEvent now broadcasts '<Persona> A <Boss> has just spawned!'. Denominator is /25 (recovery showed it varies /30·/25·/10 per realm — left at /25). Server 0 errors.
